title: You Deleted Everything and AWS Is Still Charging You
summary: AWS Developers presents a practical guide to identifying and preventing hidden charges after deleting AWS resources. The video covers a cleanup checklist, common sources of surprise billing such as RDS snapshots and EBS volumes, and demonstrates how to set up billing alarms for cost monitoring.
